/usr/bin/cc -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/include -g -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib -L/home/hviswan/anaconda3/envs/MCGINO/lib CMakeFiles/boo.dir/main.c.o -o boo  libfoo.a
